description: A barefoot young girl in a simple white dress sits on a stone doorstep, absorbed in studying a small image or card she holds in her hands. Her auburn hair is parted in the center. She sits at the threshold between a dark interior and the outside, lit by natural daylight that illuminates her white garment. A small window is visible in the dark room behind her. The stone doorframe and rough ground suggest a humble rural dwelling. The scene is quiet and tender, capturing a private moment of absorption and innocence.

_meta.title: Girl lost in contemplation of an image of the Virgin
